params.name: The Art of Poetry
params.description: This poem, consisting of 476 lines, uses concise language and unique insights to explore poetic techniques, the relationship between art and life, and the role of poetry in society. It elaborates the state of Roman literature and is considered one of the cornerstones of Renaissance art theory, promoting cultural progress and artistic prosperity.
